calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Kari Masumitsu.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Roger Jackson, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Midland Funding Inc.
No appearance by defendant Kari Masumitsu.
Plaintiff's complaint for Account Stated was filed October 16, 2019.
Defendant Kari Masumitsu's General Denial was filed on November 21, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on June 20, 2020, setting trial for October 19, 2020. Department 206 continued this matter to January 4, 2021, and on December 31, 2020, Department 514 continued this matter to today, February 8, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on December 17, 2020.
Declaration of Jeanette Ruff, Legal Specialist for plaintiff Midland Funding LLC, was served on January 19, 2021 in accordance with CCP Section 98 and filed January 25, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 25, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Midland Funding LLC, and against defendant Kari Masumitsu, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,313.28 - Amount Pled in Complaint

Total - $1,313.28.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-31-2020 Continued To Feb-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2020 Set For Trial On Oct-19-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Text Ruling
